queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Focusrite Control 2' AND publisher = 'Focusrite Audio Engineering Ltd.';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Focusrite Control 2' AND publisher = 'Focusrite Audio Engineering Ltd.' AND version_compare(version, '1.1014.0.0') < 0);
